calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-05-2007 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2007 Continued To Dec-14-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Minor'S Compromise, As To Minor: Manuel Silva.
Off Calendar Aug-07-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Three Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Anthony R. Lopez, Esq. for Petitioner: Manuela Silva, present as Guardian ad litem for: Manuel Silva, Diego Silva and Janathan Ramirez, th minor Claimants, and with Spanish Interpterpreter: Paz Perry.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
As to Minor: Manuel Silva, Attorney's Fees $1,125.00, Costs $1,315.64, with a net balance of $2,059.36 payable to Manuela Silva for the benefit of the minor.
As to Minor: Diego Silva, Attorney's Fees $1,125.00, Costs $1,307.64, with a net balance of $2,067.36 payable to Manuela Silva for the benefit of the minor.
As to Minor: Jonathan Ramirez, Attorney's Fees $5,750.00, Costs $5,750.00, with a net balance of $12,532.85 to be deposited in a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, 2300 16th St., San Francisco, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Orders Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.

Minor'S Compromise, As To Minor: Diego Silva.
Off Calendar Aug-07-2007 Granted Per Written Order

Minor'S Compromise, As To Minor: Jonathan Ramirez.
Off Calendar Aug-07-2007 Granted Per Written Order
